introSection: Uncharted: The Enigma of Penitence is an enclosed launched roller coaster, located at PortAventura Park in Spain. The ride is based on the Uncharted franchise. The ride was manufactured by Intamin and opened on the 17 June 2023.

sections.title: History
sections.content: PortAventura Park announced in November 2022 that they had closed an agreement with Sony Pictures to build a dark ride roller coaster. The ride was manufactured by Intamin and designed by the Sally Corporation.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with a single car. Each car sits 4 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

sections.title: Ride experience
sections.content: The roller coaster has five launches, one of these is sideways.

fullText:
Uncharted: The Enigma of Penitence is an enclosed launched roller coaster, located at PortAventura Park in Spain. The ride is based on the Uncharted franchise. The ride was manufactured by Intamin and opened on the 17 June 2023.

PortAventura Park announced in November 2022 that they had closed an agreement with Sony Pictures to build a dark ride roller coaster. The ride was manufactured by Intamin and designed by the Sally Corporation.



3 trains with a single car. Each car sits 4 across in 3 rows for a total of 12 riders per train.

The roller coaster has five launches, one of these is sideways.
